mapper.insert: insert into furniture (f_code, c_id, c_kind, c_name, f_name, f_price, f_dprice, f_createddate, f_catagory1, f_catagory2, f_catagory3, f_catagory4, f_catagory5, f_discount, f_point, f_count, f_viewcount) values ( # {f_code}, # {c_id}, # {c_kind}, # {c_name}, # {f_name}, # {f_price}, # {f_dprice}, sysdate, # {f_catagory1}, # {f_catagory2}, # {f_catagory3}, # {f_catagory4}, # {f_catagory5}, # {f_discount}, # {f_point}, # {f_count}, 0)
mapper.update: update furniture set f_name = # {f_name}, f_price = # {f_price}, f_dprice = # {f_dprice}, f_catagory1 = # {f_catagory1}, f_catagory2 = # {f_catagory2}, f_catagory3 = # {f_catagory3}, f_catagory4 = # {f_catagory4}, f_catagory5 = # {f_catagory5}, f_discount = # {f_discount}, f_point = # {f_point}, f_count = # {f_count} where f_code = # {f_code}
mapper.select:
select * from ( select rownum rnum, data.* from ( select f_code, c_id, c_kind, c_name, f_name, f_price, f_dprice, f_createddate, f_catagory1, f_catagory2, f_catagory3, f_catagory4, f_catagory5, f_discount, f_point, f_count, f_viewcount from furniture where ${searchKey} like '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' order by f_createddate desc ) data)
where rnum>=#{start} and rnum<=#{end}

select f_code, c_id, c_kind, c_name, f_name, f_price, f_dprice, f_createddate, f_catagory1, f_catagory2, f_catagory3, f_catagory4, f_catagory5, f_discount, f_point, f_count, f_viewcount from furniture where f_code = # {f_code}
select Count(*) from furniture where ${searchKey} like '%' || #{searchValue} || '%'
